data.title: OKX launches AVNT and TOSHI in the US market
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX announced that it has launched AVNT and TOSHI in the US market.

data.title: Bybit receives Virtual Asset Platform Operator license from the UAE Securities and Commodities Authority
data.description: Bybit announced that it has been granted a Virtual Asset Platform Operator license by the Securities and Commodities Authority (SCA) of the United Arab Emirates. This license will enable Bybit to provide regulated virtual asset trading, brokerage, custody, and fiat currency conversion services to retail and institutional clients throughout the UAE.

data.title: Citigroup: Core inflation is expected to cool down in September
data.description: Citigroup economists expect the core CPI to rise 0.28% in September, down from 0.35% in August. While tariffs are likely to keep commodity prices firm, slower housing inflation should moderate overall services inflation. The government shutdown could delay the release of data, but Citigroup said a softening labor market and cooling house prices reduce the risk of persistent inflation.

data.title: Trump expresses regret over 'horrible' government shutdown: House Speaker
data.description: U.S. House Speaker Johnson said that U.S. President Trump called him last night after the peace agreement was reached and expressed regret for the "horrible" shutdown situation. (Jinshi)

data.title: Du Jun Criticizes Shorting Ethereum Amid Market Trends
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, ABCDE co-founder Du Jun expressed on social media that while shorting premium treasury companies like BMNR is feasible, shorting Ethereum would be unwise.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that the well-known short-selling firm Kerrisdale Capital announced it had shorted the stock of Ethereum treasury reserve company Bitmine. Kerrisdale Capital argued that the Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) model has become mundane and lacks innovation. As nearly identical projects flood the market, premiums are collapsing, and the ability to increase the per-share Ethereum content by issuing stock above net asset value (NAV) is diminishing.

Companies pursuing the "crypto asset treasury strategy" have collectively aimed to raise over $100 billion, undermining the scarcity that once supported high premiums. Currently, many of these companies' stocks are trading at or below their net value, with their self-sustaining mechanisms stalling and models beginning to collapse.

data.title: Kerrisdale Capital clarifies: No short position in ETH
data.description: Short-selling firm Kerrisdale Capital previously announced a short position on Ethereum treasury firm BitMine. However, the company clarified on the X platform that it did not short ETH and stated that anyone interested in ETH could simply purchase it directly. Meanwhile, according to US stock market data, BMNR fell 3.55% during trading, bringing its market capitalization down to $16.5 billion.

data.title: Strategy Executive Sells Shares Worth $10.7 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Strategy's Executive Vice President Shao Wei-Ming has sold 30,000 shares of MSTR at a price of $357.37 per share, totaling approximately $10.7 million. This transaction was disclosed by BitcoinTreasuries.

data.title: Shao Wei-Min, Executive Vice President of Strategy, sold 30,000 shares of MSTR stock for $10.7 million.
data.description: According to market news: Strategy Executive Vice President Shao Wei-Ming has sold 30,000 shares of MSTR stock at a price of $357.37, worth $10.7 million.

data.title: Short-selling firm Kerrisdale Capital announced a short position on Ethereum treasury company BitMine
data.description: Short-selling firm Kerrisdale Capital announced on the X platform that it has shorted the shares of Bitmine, the Ethereum treasury reserve company. It believes that the so-called DAT (Digital Asset Treasury) model has become mediocre and unoriginal: when nearly identical copycat projects flood the market, premiums are collapsing, and the ability to increase the ETH content per share by issuing shares above net asset value (NAV) is also disappearing.

data.title: Grayscale Selects Figment as US ETH ETP and SOL Trust Staking Provider
data.description: According to official news, Figment, an institutional staking service provider, announced that it has been selected as the staking partner of Grayscale Investments when it first launched Ethereum ETP and Solana Trust staking services in the United States.

data.title: Four.Meme: Daily revenue reaches $1.48 million, with over 48,000 tokens issued in 24 hours
data.description: Four.Meme posted on the X platform that the platform issued over 48,000 tokens in the past 24 hours, with daily revenue reaching $1.48 million, 2.6 times that of pump.fun during the same period.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 121,000 USDT with a 1.18% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 14:47 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 121,000 USDT and is now trading at 120,976.289063 USDT, with a narrowed 1.18% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Peru’s BCP launches cryptocurrency financial platform Criptococos
data.description: Banco de Crédito del Perú (BCP), Peru's largest bank and comprehensive financial services provider, announced the launch of Criptococos, Peru's first cryptocurrency financial platform, to enable the secure purchase and management of crypto assets. The platform is part of a pilot project authorized by the Superintendent of Banks, Insurances and Pension Funds (SBS) of Peru and is supported by BitGo. (Businesswire)

data.title: Watt Protocol's official X account was hacked and a phishing tweet was posted
data.description: According to Scam Sniffer, Watt Protocol's official account "X" has been compromised, with attackers using it to post phishing tweets. Users are advised to remain vigilant and avoid clicking on related links or performing any interactive actions.

data.title: Crypto stocks saw mixed gains and losses at the opening of the US stock market, with BitMine falling 1.96%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.1%, the S&P 500 rose 0.1%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.01%. The crypto sector saw mixed gains and losses, with BitMine down 1.96%, Coinbase up 3.68%, Strategy down 0.98%, Tron up 4.36%, and Circle up 0.53%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: The Monad airdrop claim portal will open on October 14th
data.description: Monad announced on the X platform that the airdrop claim portal will open on October 14 (Tuesday).

data.title: Grayscale Transfers 3,701 ETH to Centralized Exchange
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Grayscale has transferred 3,701 ETH, valued at $16.3 million, to a centralized exchange (CEX) address. This transaction was identified through monitoring by lookonchain.

data.title: US-listed SOL Treasury firm DFDV launches weekly options trading on the Chicago Board Options Exchange
data.description: DeFi Development Corp., a US-listed SOL treasury company, announced that weekly options on its stock have officially launched for trading on the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE). The launch of weekly options will reportedly provide investors with more flexible hedging opportunities and short-term strategy tools, complementing the existing monthly options product. Parker White, the company's Chief Investment Officer and Chief Operating Officer, stated that the launch of weekly options is a significant milestone for DFDV, providing investors with a new way to interact with stocks and adding derivative tools for short-term strategies. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE)

data.title: Xiao He, a customer service representative of Whale Trading with a 50% win rate, made a profit of $380,000 in 28 minutes.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale trading agent, Xiao He, made a profit of $380,000 in 28 minutes. From 7:47 PM to 8:06 PM, he bought $268,000 at an average price of $0.0152. Xiao He: 8:10 PM: Binance Alpha officially launched. Xiao He: 8:10 PM to 8:15 PM: He liquidated his position in batches at an average price of $0.0367. This is a new address created yesterday. It withdrew 50 BNB from OKX as initial funding. It only traded with Gorilla and Xiao He, with a 50% win rate.

data.title: DeFi Development Announces the Launch of DFDV JP, a Japanese Treasury Project on Solana
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Solana treasury company DeFi Development has announced a partnership with Superteam Japan to launch DFDV JP, reportedly Japan’s first Solana-focused digital asset treasury project. DeFi Development previously launched DFDV Korea in South Korea. (Globenewswire)
